top_findings.summary: The skill description explicitly states it will "auto-retrieve code from iMessage" for 2FA authentication. Accessing SMS/iMessage data constitutes excessive data collection unrelated to the core ride-booking functionality. While authentication is necessary, reading personal messages goes beyond what's required for Lyft integration. Users should manually enter 2FA codes or the skill should use secure authentication methods that don't require message access.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description explicitly states it will "auto-retrieve code from iMessage" for 2FA authentication. Accessing SMS/iMessage data constitutes excessive data collection unrelated to the core ride-booking functionality. While authentication is necessary, reading personal messages goes beyond what's required for Lyft integration. Users should manually enter 2FA codes or the skill should use secure authentication methods that don't require message access.
